_comment: Candidate feeds to VERIFY with tools/verify_feeds.py where the internet is open (the build container's egress is blocked). URLs are best-known leads (round 1 of discovery) — NOT yet confirmed feeds. Each carries the labels the catalog needs; verify_feeds.py fetches each, autodiscovers the RSS link if it's a page, parses it, and emits a verified catalog entry (or marks it unverified with a reason). Nothing here is assumed live.

feeds.label: U.S. Dept of Education — news
feeds.purpose: federal education policy/funding news affecting teachers and students

feeds.label: Florida Senate — calendars
feeds.purpose: Florida Senate calendar/legislation feed (education bills, Title XLVIII)

feeds.label: Florida DOE — newsroom
feeds.purpose: Florida DOE program/policy announcements (state canonical source)
feeds._hint: page; autodiscover RSS, else check FLDOE GovDelivery topics for an RSS endpoint

feeds.label: CPALMS — updates
feeds._hint: page; autodiscover RSS, else likely a JSON API — provide the feed/API URL directly

feeds.label: Orange County Public Schools — newsroom
feeds.purpose: OCPS (district 48, Orange County FL) official district news affecting teachers and students
feeds._hint: Finalsite; autodiscover the RSS <link>, else try a /site/RSS URL found in the page source

feeds.label: Monarch Learning Academy — school news
feeds.purpose: Monarch Learning Academy (private PK-8 Christian, College Park/Orlando FL) school news/calendar
feeds._hint: FACTS/ParentsWeb site; likely no RSS — check for an .ics/iCal calendar export instead
